description: This animal is called the king of the forest. It has long hair on its head and makes loud sounds.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物被称为森林之王。它头上有长毛，会发出很大的声音。

description: This is the biggest animal on land. It has a long nose and big ears.
descriptionChinese: 这是陆地上最大的动物。它有长长的鼻子和大耳朵。

description: This animal has black and white stripes. It lives in Africa.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物有黑白条纹。它生活在非洲。

description: This animal is a big cat with orange fur and black stripes.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物是一种大猫，有橙色的皮毛和黑色的条纹。

description: This animal has a long neck and spots. It is the tallest animal on land.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物有长长的脖子和斑点。它是陆地上最高的动物。

description: This bear is from China. It has black and white fur.
descriptionChinese: 这种熊来自中国。它有黑白相间的皮毛。

description: This is a big animal that lives in the sea. It is very big and kind.
descriptionChinese: 这是一种生活在海里的大动物。它很大很善良。

description: This animal lives in trees and is smart.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物生活在树上，很聪明。

description: This is a big reptile with a long tail and sharp teeth.
descriptionChinese: 这是一种大爬行动物，有长长的尾巴和锋利的牙齿。

description: This bird cannot fly. It lives in a very cold place.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟不会飞。它生活在一个非常寒冷的地方。

description: This small animal has a long tail and likes to eat cheese.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有长长的尾巴，喜欢吃奶酪。

description: This big bird flies high and has sharp claws and a curved beak.
descriptionChinese: 这种大鸟飞得很高，有锋利的爪子和弯曲的嘴巴。

description: This pet likes to chase mice.
descriptionChinese: 这种宠物喜欢追逐老鼠。

description: This pet is people's best friend.
descriptionChinese: 这种宠物是人类最好的朋友。

description: This big animal eats grass. It has horns and lives in groups.
descriptionChinese: 这种大动物吃草。它有角，成群生活。

description: This small insect gets sweet juice from flowers.
descriptionChinese: 这种小昆虫从花中采集甜味的汁液。

description: This big fish has sharp teeth and is a top hunter in the sea.
descriptionChinese: 这种大鱼有锋利的牙齿，是海里的顶级猎手。

description: This animal carries its babies in a bag on its belly. It hops around.
descriptionChinese: 这种动物在腹部的袋子里携带宝宝。它跳来跳去。

description: This bird is active at night. It has big eyes and can turn its head almost all the way around.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟在夜间活动。它有大眼睛，可以将头几乎完全转一圈。

description: This small animal can live in water and on land. It has smooth skin and can jump high.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物可以生活在水里和陆地上。它有光滑的皮肤，可以跳得很高。

description: This big cat has spots and runs very fast.
descriptionChinese: 这种大猫有斑点，跑得非常快。

description: This small animal has a bushy tail and likes to eat nuts.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有浓密的尾巴，喜欢吃坚果。

description: This long reptile sheds its skin as it grows.
descriptionChinese: 这种长爬行动物在生长过程中会蜕皮。

description: This sea animal is smart and likes to play.
descriptionChinese: 这种海洋动物很聪明，喜欢玩耍。

description: This big animal has a hump on its back and lives in hot, dry places.
descriptionChinese: 这种大动物背上有驼峰，生活在炎热干燥的地方。

description: This bird sings very beautifully.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟唱歌非常好听。

description: This small animal has long ears and a fluffy tail.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有长长的耳朵和蓬松的尾巴。

description: This wild animal has thick fur and lives in cold places. It howls at night.
descriptionChinese: 这种野生动物有厚厚的皮毛，生活在寒冷的地方。它在夜间嚎叫。

description: This bird has colorful feathers and can copy what people say.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟有彩色的羽毛，可以模仿人们说的话。

description: This small animal has sharp spines on its back to protect itself.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物背上有锋利的刺来保护自己。

description: This reptile lives in the sea. It has a hard shell and lays eggs on beaches.
descriptionChinese: 这种爬行动物生活在海里。它有坚硬的壳，在海滩上产卵。

description: This big animal eats grass. It has horns on its head and lives in forests.
descriptionChinese: 这种大动物吃草。它头上有角，生活在森林里。

description: This small insect has six legs and pretty wings.
descriptionChinese: 这种小昆虫有六条腿和漂亮的翅膀。

description: This big cat has long hair on its head and lives in groups.
descriptionChinese: 这种大猫头上有长毛，成群生活。

description: This small animal has a long nose and eats insects.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有长长的鼻子，吃昆虫。

description: This big animal has a hump and is used for carrying things in the desert.
descriptionChinese: 这种大动物有驼峰，在沙漠中被用来搬运东西。

description: This bird has a very long neck and long legs.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟有非常长的脖子和长腿。

description: This small animal has a bushy tail and is very clever.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有浓密的尾巴，非常聪明。

description: This big sea animal has long tusks and whiskers.
descriptionChinese: 这种大海动物有长长的獠牙和胡须。

description: This bird can swim underwater very well.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟能很好地在水下游泳。

description: This small animal has a long tail and can jump from tree to tree.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有长长的尾巴，可以从一棵树跳到另一棵树。

description: This reptile has a hard shell and moves very slowly.
descriptionChinese: 这种爬行动物有坚硬的壳，移动非常缓慢。

description: This bird has a very long beak and colorful feathers.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟有非常长的嘴巴和彩色的羽毛。

description: This small animal has a pointy nose and comes out at night.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有尖尖的鼻子，在夜间出来活动。

description: This big animal eats grass. It has a long tail and lives in groups.
descriptionChinese: 这种大动物吃草。它有长长的尾巴，成群生活。

description: This bird can fly very far in different seasons.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟在不同季节可以飞行很远的距离。

description: This small animal has a striped tail and is very curious.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有条纹尾巴，非常好奇。

description: This big bear has thick white fur and lives in very cold places.
descriptionChinese: 这种大熊有厚厚的白色皮毛，生活在非常寒冷的地方。

description: This bird has beautiful feathers and does a special dance to find a friend.
descriptionChinese: 这种鸟有美丽的羽毛，会跳特殊的舞蹈来寻找朋友。

description: This small animal has a bag and lives in Australia. It eats leaves.
descriptionChinese: 这种小动物有袋子，生活在澳大利亚。它吃树叶。
